creator: rotkaps_spam_trap@gmx.de
text:
The icon in the window of an open, running firefox3 shows not the firefox icon, but the X11 icon. See http://www.rotkap.gmxhome.de/firefox3.png

and http://www.rotkap.gmxhome.de/frefox3_kde_kicker.png

(running on KDE3.5)

The port www/firefox (firefox2) doeas not have that bug. It shows the firefox icon.

How-To-Repeat: 	run www/firefox3 on kde3.5
